/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic -O3 -march=native -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/graph_engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/graph_engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_engine.dir/src/ArenaAllocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_engine.dir/src/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_engine.dir/src/Solver.cpp.o -o graph_engine
